title: T-024 — SCN-settings page (beep / vibration / camera / language / PIN change) (06-a)
prompt:
# T-024 — SCN-settings

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-010
UX: prototypes/design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:778-813 §3.22
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:63-136 (label settings_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver per-user scanner settings: beep on/off, vibration on/off, auto-advance on/off, camera selection (when multi), scan timeout (s), session timeout preview (read-only), language selector (pl/en/uk/ro), 'Zmień PIN' button → /scanner/pin/change. Persist to localStorage and sync to user profile on logout.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/settings/page.tsx`.
2. Form fields backed by RHF + zod; localStorage keys reused from T-005.
3. 'Zmień PIN' button uses next-link to /scanner/pin/change.
4. Language picker matches §4.10 language_sheet prototype reused inline.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/settings/settings-form.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-settings.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:63-136`, then it has the same six settings rows in order beep / vibration / auto-advance / camera / scan timeout / language plus the 'Zmień PIN' button at the bottom — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given the user toggles vibration off and reloads, when the page reloads, then localStorage scanner.feedback.vibration='false' and the toggle reflects off
3. Given the user clicks 'Zmień PIN', when the click is handled, then navigation occurs to /scanner/pin/change

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-settings.test.tsx asserting parity + persistence + change-PIN navigation before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-settings'

## Risk red lines
- Do not store any PII in localStorage
- Do not let session timeout preview be editable (must be read-only admin-set)
- Do not omit language selector

pipeline_inputs.description: User-level scanner settings page (beep / vibration / auto-advance / camera / scan timeout / language) + 'Zmień PIN' link.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 6 setting rows in order beep, vibration, auto-advance, camera, scan timeout, language.
2) Session timeout preview rendered read-only.
3) 'Zmień PIN' button at the bottom linking to /scanner/pin/change.
4) Persist to localStorage; sync to profile on logout (handled in T-007 logout path; this task only writes the keys).
out_of_scope: Do not implement language sheet primitive here (consume existing inline)
Do not implement profile-sync endpoint here (T-007 owns logout side-effect)
Do not implement P2 flows here: transfer-order (TO) creation, replenishment, cycle-count, inquiry full traceability — P1 stubs only
Do not implement offline queue write-path here (P2); P1 keeps offline-safe scan buffer + indicator only
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:63-136, then it has the same six setting rows in the same order plus 'Zmień PIN' button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given the user toggles vibration off and reloads, when the page reloads, then localStorage scanner.feedback.vibration='false' and the toggle reflects off
Given the user clicks 'Zmień PIN', when the click is handled, then navigation occurs to /scanner/pin/change. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED: write scn-settings.test.tsx asserting parity + persistence + change-PIN navigation before implementation
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not store PII in localStorage
Do not allow editing session timeout preview
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
cross_module_dependencies: 02-settings: PIN policy, locale, scanner device defaults
